The '''MD-series medical droid''' was a line of [[medical droid]], including<ref name="Choose Your Destiny" /> [[MD-15C medical droid]].<ref name="TLJVD">''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> One MD-series [[droid]], [[Emdee]], served the [[First Order]].<ref name="Choose Your Destiny" />

==Behind the scenes==
The MD-series medical droid first identified in ''[[Choose Your Destiny: A Finn & Poe Adventure]]'' which was written by [[Cavan Scott]] and illustrated by [[Elsa Charretier]].<ref name="Choose Your Destiny" /> The adventure book was released on [[October 4]], [[2019]].<ref name="Amazon">{{Disney|subdomain=books|url=book/a-finn-poe-adventure|text=A Finn & Poe Adventure}}</ref> In [[Star Wars Legends]] the droid first appeared in ''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' which was released in [[June]], [[1992]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

{{Droid-stub}}
